rules: current_version_id must equal exactly one versions[].artifact_version_id
artifact_version_id is immutable and revisions are unique positive integers starting at 1
each version belongs to the parent artifact and a new revision appends rather than mutates prior content
publish_package_ref content must contain package_id, publishing_schema_version=2, package_fingerprint and non-empty source_artifact_version_ids
source_artifact_version_ids must reference versions in the same project before handoff
validator: COORD-0 contract test / future app-center domain validator
